verdicts.verdict_greek: Ἀρχὴ γὰρ πορνείας ἐπίνοια εἰδώλων, εὕρεσις δὲ αὐτῶν φθορὰ ζωῆς.
verdicts.reasoning: The scan clearly reads singular εὕρεσις and ζωῆς (not ξωῆς), matching A and also the closely related Cambridge/Tischendorf tradition here.

notes: Adjudicated from Swete p. 629 (scan 646); verse 12 main text only, ignoring apparatus.
